title: 将虚拟机配置导入为计划虚拟机并校验落地为真实虚拟机
output:
==== RESULTS ====
PASS = True
export_rv = 4096
import_rv = 0
validate_rv = 4096
realize_rv = 4096
planned_guid = 2EA4B6EB-74F9-497B-BE8D-D47C0FE8C25A
planned_is_planned = True
realized_class = Msvm_ComputerSystem
realized_guid = 2EA4B6EB-74F9-497B-BE8D-D47C0FE8C25A
orig_guid = 74018E6A-F765-411D-A9D3-1734018AB7E1
note_planned_guid_differs_from_orig = True
note_realized_guid_eq_orig = False
assert_isRealVM = True
assert_name = True
assert_plannedWasPlanned = True
assert_plannedGone = True
assert_enumerable = True
ASSERT: PASS
CLEANUP: remaining WMITEST_planned_realize = 0
(独立复核: real=0 planned=0)
notes: 完整链路为 ExportSystemDefinition -> ImportSystemDefinition（得 Msvm_PlannedComputerSystem）-> ValidatePlannedSystem -> RealizePlannedSystem（得真实 Msvm_ComputerSystem）。

ImportSystemDefinition 签名为 (SystemDefinitionFile=导出的 .vmcx 全路径, SnapshotFolder=虚拟机导出根目录, GenerateNewSystemIdentifier=boolean)，返回 OUT 参数 ImportedSystem（类 Msvm_PlannedComputerSystem）及 Job；导入通常同步返回 rv=0。

ExportSystemDefinition 签名为 (ComputerSystem REF, ExportDirectory, ExportSettingData=嵌入 Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData 的 GetText(1) 串)。导出物结构为 <ExportDirectory>\<VM ElementName>\Virtual Machines\<GUID>.vmcx。
ValidatePlannedSystem(PlannedSystem REF) 与 RealizePlannedSystem(PlannedSystem REF) 均接受计划虚拟机的 __PATH；Realize 的 OUT 参数为 ResultingSystem（类 CIM_ComputerSystem）。
Export/Validate/Realize 三个方法可能异步返回 4096，需通过 Wait-Job2 轮询 Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState 至 7（Completed）。
Realize 异步完成后 ResultingSystem 引用可能为空，需按 ElementName 回查 Msvm_ComputerSystem 作为兜底。
PowerShell 5.1 无 [uint8] 类型加速器，CopySnapshotConfiguration 等 uint8 属性需用 [byte] 转型。
GenerateNewSystemIdentifier=true 会为计划虚拟机分配新 GUID。落地后真实虚拟机的 GUID 是否等于原 GUID 取决于源虚拟机是否仍存在及时序，故此项仅作说明而非断言。
RealizePlannedSystem 成功后对应的 Msvm_PlannedComputerSystem 自动消失。若中途失败，计划虚拟机需用 DestroySystem 清理。
使用 CopyVmStorage=$false 的纯配置导出（无 VHD）即可完成整条计划/落地链路，无需真实磁盘。
title_en: Import a Virtual Machine Configuration as a Planned VM and Verify It Realizes into a Real VM
notes_en: The complete chain is ExportSystemDefinition -> ImportSystemDefinition (yielding an Msvm_PlannedComputerSystem) -> ValidatePlannedSystem -> RealizePlannedSystem (yielding a real Msvm_ComputerSystem).

The ImportSystemDefinition signature is (SystemDefinitionFile=full path of the exported .vmcx, SnapshotFolder=the VM export root directory, GenerateNewSystemIdentifier=boolean); it returns the OUT parameter ImportedSystem (class Msvm_PlannedComputerSystem) and a Job. The import typically returns rv=0 synchronously.

The ExportSystemDefinition signature is (ComputerSystem REF, ExportDirectory, ExportSettingData=the GetText(1) string of an embedded Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData). The export layout is <ExportDirectory>\<VM ElementName>\Virtual Machines\<GUID>.vmcx.
ValidatePlannedSystem(PlannedSystem REF) and RealizePlannedSystem(PlannedSystem REF) both accept the planned VM's __PATH; the OUT parameter of Realize is ResultingSystem (class CIM_ComputerSystem).
The three methods Export/Validate/Realize may return 4096 asynchronously, requiring Wait-Job2 to poll Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState until 7 (Completed).
After Realize completes asynchronously, the ResultingSystem reference may be empty, requiring a fallback query for the Msvm_ComputerSystem by ElementName.
PowerShell 5.1 has no [uint8] type accelerator, so uint8 properties such as CopySnapshotConfiguration must be cast with [byte].

GenerateNewSystemIdentifier=true assigns a new GUID to the planned VM. Whether the realized VM's GUID equals the original GUID depends on whether the source VM still exists and on timing, so this item is provided as an explanatory note rather than an assertion.
After RealizePlannedSystem succeeds, the corresponding Msvm_PlannedComputerSystem disappears automatically. If it fails midway, the planned VM must be cleaned up with DestroySystem.
A configuration-only export with CopyVmStorage=$false (no VHD) is sufficient to complete the entire planned/realize chain, with no real disk required.
